## Problem

What work-memory, privacy, setup, or intelligence problem should this solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the smallest useful behavior.

## Area

Choose one: install, onboarding, docs, UI, backend, integrations, models,
knowledge graph, workflows, plugins, MCP, privacy, testing, release.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The behavior is documented or discoverable.
- [ ] It works without private sample data.
- [ ] It degrades gracefully when optional local services are missing.
